title: Savlayachi Janu Savali
subTitle: A woman with a dusky complexion and a melodious voice faces various obstacles. Her life gets entangled with a man whose mother wants a beautiful bride for him.

title: Veen Doghantali Hi Tutena
subTitle: Samar, a wealthy tycoon, and Swanandi, a young middle-class professional, enter a marriage of convenience. However, their contractual nuptials gradually evolve into a profound connection.

title: Tula Japnar Aahe
subTitle: After Ambika's tragic death, her husband Atharva and daughter Veda are heartbroken. However, her spirit returns to watch over and protect Veda in unseen yet powerful ways.

title: Kamali
subTitle: A courageous kabaddi champion hailing from the countryside of Maharashtra challenges her family's expectations by venturing to Mumbai in pursuit of her aspirations.

subTitle: Jamkar explains taking Saket out to Sudhakar. However, when Saket mentions seeing Gopal, a panicked Gopal chases their car, leading Jamkar to uncover the truth about Saket's accident.
